purpose: Resolve exact pre-solution revisions and trees, verify PR lineage, and read license or use-basis evidence at that pinned revision for the 31-row rank-5 queue.
terminal_status_note: This artifact is terminal only for exact-base-resolvable and license-or-use-basis. It neither selects candidates nor decides boundedness, instruction parity, evaluator feasibility, or reproduction.

method.solution_commit_inventory: Use the complete commit links embedded in the direct closing PR HTML; all selected PR commit counts were recovered exactly.
method.base_rule: The exact pre-solution base is the sole first parent of the first PR commit after verifying the fetched PR head, ancestor order, and base-to-head changed paths against the separately hashed GitHub .diff.
method.tree_rule: Read the Git commit tree hashes for base and PR head directly from fetched objects.
method.license_rule: Inspect LICENSE, LICENCE, COPYING, NOTICE, and UNLICENSE artifacts in the exact base tree. If no license artifact exists, inspect root README and build manifests before recording absence.
method.terminal_boundary: Only these exact-revision bytes may pass or fail license_or_use_basis; current-HEAD signals remain historical priority observations.
method.diff_identity_rule: Git-generated and GitHub-rendered diff bytes are hashed separately and are not required to match; binary rendering and index formatting differ. Base validation requires the fetched head plus exact changed-path set/count agreement.

review_provenance.independent_review: Bounded read-only Claude CLI review of six anomaly/control rows followed by Codex direct-source and Git-object cross-check; all six license identifications agreed.
review_provenance.reviewed_diff_caveat: Claude flagged two differing Git/GitHub diff byte hashes. The cross-check confirmed byte equality was never a base criterion; all 31 independently parsed changed-path sets and counts match.

next_boundary: Apply the 27 pass and four fail license decisions to the ledger with exact hashes. Then inventory exact-tree instructions for the 26 non-scope pass rows and retain the rescued MIT row in solution-scope review.
